title: Port 517 — talk
summary: Well-known port 517 (tcp/udp): like tenex link, but across machine - unfortunately, doesn't use link protocol (this is actually just a rendezvous port from which a tcp connection is established). Service name: talk.
source_version: IANA registry, Last-Modified: Fri, 29 May 2026 01:11:28 GMT

raw_columns.Description: like tenex link, but across machine - unfortunately, doesn't use link protocol (this is actually just a rendezvous port from which a tcp connection is established)
